title: lespedeza formosa var. pubescens
intro: Lespedeza formosa var. pubescens, also known as the hairy bush clover, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lespedeza formosa var. pubescens include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially lowering blood sugar levels and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Lespedeza formosa var. pubescens is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
